assertions.description: The BLDC motor controller PCB has three voltage rails (/48v, /12v, /5v) that all have significant track routing: /48v has 135mm total length with 122 vias and a 4159mm² copper zone (the largest zone on the board), /12v has 146mm total length, and /5v has 160mm total length. Despite this, power_net_routing and current_capacity.power_ground_nets only contain '/GND'. The nets appear correctly in net_lengths, showing the analyzer can parse them but fails to classify them as power nets. The leading slash in KiCad hierarchical net names (/48v vs 48v) likely prevents the power-net heuristic from matching them.
